apps.title: Archer Rampage
apps.summary:
The kingdom is under attack, and only one hero can stop the invasion!

Step into the shoes of a fearless archer and battle through endless waves of enemies in this fast-paced action roguelike adventure. Dodge incoming attacks, defeat powerful bosses, and choose unique abilities every time you level up. No two runs are ever the same!

Master your aim, discover powerful combinations, and become stronger with every battle.

Features

Fast-paced action gameplay inspired by classic roguelike adventures

Fight hundreds of enemies across beautiful fantasy worlds

Choose powerful skills and create unique combinations every run

Challenge epic bosses with different attack patterns

Upgrade your hero, equipment, and abilities

Explore multiple environments filled with dangerous monsters

Collect coins, rewards, and valuable loot

Play anytime, anywhere — no internet required

How to Play
• Move to dodge enemy attacks.
• Your archer automatically shoots nearby enemies.
• Level up during battle and choose new abilities.
• Combine powerful upgrades to create unstoppable builds.
• Defeat the boss and unlock the next adventure.

Every run is different. Every upgrade matters.

Can you survive the rampage and become the legendary Archer?

apps.title: Knock Fever
apps.summary:
Ready to bring down every tower with the perfect shot?
Load your cannon, take aim, and blast your way through hundreds of satisfying levels in Knock Fever! Every shot matters as you knock down colorful structures, trigger explosive chain reactions, and watch towers collapse in spectacular fashion.
Simple to learn, challenging to master—can you become the ultimate cannon champion?
Blast Towers with Precision
Every level presents a unique structure waiting to be destroyed. Aim carefully, find the weakest point, and fire your cannon to bring everything crashing down.
Satisfying Destruction
Experience realistic physics as towers collapse, blocks tumble, and perfectly placed shots create huge chain reactions. Every successful hit is incredibly satisfying.
Hundreds of Unique Levels
Face a variety of creative tower layouts that require different strategies. As the challenge grows, you'll need sharper aim and smarter shots to clear every stage.
Easy Controls
Simply aim, shoot, and watch the action unfold. Whether you have a few minutes or a long gaming session, Knock Fever is easy to pick up and impossible to put down.
Why You'll Love Knock Fever
• Fun and satisfying cannon gameplay
• Colorful tower-smashing action
• Physics-based destruction mechanics
• Easy controls with rewarding challenges
• Hundreds of handcrafted levels
• Smooth animations and exciting effects
• Perfect for quick, relaxing gameplay sessions
Do you have what it takes to knock down every tower?
Grab your cannon, line up the perfect shot, and start blasting your way to victory in Knock Fever!

apps.title: Beach Bliss: Merge Puzzle
apps.summary:
Escape to a tropical paradise where every merge brings your dream beach resort to life!
Welcome to Beach Bliss, the relaxing merge game that combines satisfying Merge-2 gameplay with exciting makeover and renovation adventures. Merge colorful items, complete fun orders, restore beautiful seaside locations, and give charming characters stunning new looks.
Merge & Discover
Merge matching items to create upgraded tools, tropical treats, beach decorations, and countless unique discoveries. Every merge unlocks new possibilities and helps you progress through your island adventure.
Give Amazing Makeovers
Meet unforgettable characters who need your help. Transform their style with fabulous makeovers, fresh outfits, hairstyles, and accessories while uncovering their heartwarming stories.
Renovate a Beautiful Beach Paradise
Restore cozy beach houses, stylish cafés, relaxing resorts, and breathtaking tropical locations. Design every corner the way you like and turn a forgotten coastline into the ultimate vacation destination.
Enjoy Relaxing Puzzle Gameplay
Complete merge challenges, fulfill customer requests, earn valuable rewards, and unlock new areas filled with exciting surprises. Whether you play for a few minutes or a few hours, there's always something satisfying to merge.
Explore a Tropical Story
Follow engaging stories full of friendship, romance, mystery, and personal growth. Help each character overcome challenges as your beach paradise continues to flourish.
Features:
Relaxing Merge-2 puzzle gameplay
Hundreds of items to merge and discover
Character makeover and customization
Renovate and decorate beautiful beach locations
Complete fun tasks and rewarding quests
Unlock new tropical areas and exciting stories
Beautiful colorful visuals inspired by seaside vacations
Frequent updates with new events, characters, and merge content
Pack your bags, soak up the sunshine, and start your tropical adventure today. Merge, decorate, makeover, and create the beach paradise of your dreams in Beach Bliss!

apps.title: Find Differences: Spot it!
apps.summary:
Are you ready to become a master detective? 🔍
Whether you are looking to challenge your brain or simply want a peaceful way to pass the time, Find Differences: Spot it has something for everyone! 🎉 If you love hidden object games, item search, detective stories, funny brain-teasers, and classic visual puzzles... this is the perfect game to sharpen your mind while helping you relax.

Game Features
👀 Find & Spot the Hidden Differences
Some clues are obvious, like a missing object or a shift in color. Others may be subtle, needing you to zoom in and spot the tiniest changes.

🎨 Animated Picture Puzzle & Storytelling
Go beyond random images! Our exclusive Cartoon Puzzles feature beautifully illustrated and funny storytelling pictures. As you solve each puzzle, you unlock funny comic-style brain-teasers. It’s not just about looking for differences—it's about following a delightful visual story that will make you smile.

⏰ No Time Limit – Zero Stress, Unlimited Time
Forget about stressful countdowns and frantic clicking. We believe puzzle games should be relaxing, which is why we provide No Time Limit mode. Take all the time you need to scan the pictures and find out every hidden difference at your own comfortable pace. Enjoy unlimited time for searching without any pressure!

Amazing Benefits of Playing
🧠 Funny Brain-Teasers: Actively boost your brain and improve cognitive agility.
🌈 Stress Relief & Mindfulness: Immerse yourself in the world of animated picture puzzles, enjoying your search with no time limit.
✨ Animated Picture Puzzle: Enjoy 10,000+ HD animated pictures and funny brain-teaser puzzles freely!
🔎 Intuitive Zoom Feature: Easily pinch to enlarge the pictures for immersive searching, so you can spot even the most microscopic details.
🎯 Helpful Hints: Stuck on a particularly tricky level? Use the hint to point out the right place without spoiling the fun.

Join the puzzle lovers and see how many hidden differences you can find! 🥰

apps.title: ZigWord: Calm Word Puzzle
apps.summary:
ZigWord is a mindful word puzzle game where every level pairs an irregular letter grid with a breathtaking landscape — beaches, sunsets, mountain vistas, ocean horizons. Swipe across letters to connect them into words. Find hidden words across themed grids and unwind, one quiet moment at a time.

Each level brings a new theme — Pets, Movies, Flowers, Weather, Music, Trees, and many more. Slide your finger horizontally or vertically to connect adjacent letters and reveal the answers that fit the theme. Hidden answers can be read forward or backward, so train your eyes to spot them from any angle. Spell a real word that isn't on the level list? You'll trigger a BONUS — a gentle reward for knowing more.

Play through a 3,000-level main journey, then come back each morning for a fresh Daily Challenge — a new puzzle every 24 hours to keep the ritual alive.

A word puzzle game in scenic nature. Real scenery as backgrounds — beach, ocean, sunset, mountains. ZigWord is built for the offline moments you need to stay in the flow — on the train, on a hike, anywhere off-grid. No timers. No pressure. Just letters, nature views, and the soft chime of a small celebration when you solve.

✦ HOW TO PLAY ZIGWORD
• Theme-driven puzzles — every level groups its answers around a single topic
• Forward AND reverse reading — flexible thinking welcome
• Bonus rewards for every extra word you discover
• Minimalist overlay design — soft semi-transparent letter tiles let the view shine through

✦ WHAT'S INSIDE
• 3,000+ hand-crafted levels across a growing main journey
• Daily Challenge — a fresh word puzzle every day, with streaks to reward the players who show up
• Countless themes — Pets, Movies, Flowers, Music, and many more
• 100% offline — play on the train, in a cabin, on a flight

✦ WHY YOU'LL LOVE
• A daily reason to return — new Daily Challenge every morning, plus 3,000 levels waiting in the main story
• Short levels perfect for a quick break, a commute, or 10 minutes before bed
• Helpful Hint, Firework and Paper Plane tools when you're stuck
• Collect coins as you play, save up for the tools you need most
• A daily brain training ritual that boosts vocabulary, spelling, and mental focus

✦ WHO ZIGWORD IS FOR
• Word puzzle game fans
• Brain training enthusiasts
• Crossword players looking for something gentler
• Adults who want a calm puzzle game to relax with after work
• Anyone who'd rather find hidden words in beautiful scenery than rush for a leaderboard rank

Whether you have two minutes or twenty, ZigWord turns letters into a quiet little win every time you play — set against a view that feels like a small vacation. Download ZigWord today — find hidden words, unwind offline, and let nature settle the mind. Got feedback? Email us at support@oakevergames.com

apps.title: Carnival Knockdown
apps.summary:
Think carefully, launch your ball, and bring down clever physics structures across unique challenge arenas.

Each level is a small destruction puzzle: find the weak spot, use limited shots wisely, and trigger satisfying chain reactions. Break stone walls, topple wooden towers, crack ice blocks, and master new materials as the levels get harder.
Easy to start, tricky to master.

🌟 GAME FEATURES:

🎯 One-Tap Action: Just tap the screen and fire your cannonball.

🧩 Dynamic Physics & Materials: Every object reacts differently! Send light wood flying, push heavy iron, smash glass jars (with a satisfying ASMR feel!), or slide icy blocks!

🎪 Stunning Carnival Theme: Hundreds of levels filled with colorful graphics and fun animations.

Can you clear every structure with the perfect shot?

apps.title: Pixel Beads
apps.summary:
Step into the colorful world of Pixel Beads, where color sorting meets pixel art fun! Sort sparkling 3D beads, match colors with precision, and watch stunning pixel art masterpieces come to life — one bead at a time.

🎮 How to Play
Step 1 — Sort & Organize
Observe the beads on the canvas and use your tray as a strategic workspace. Gather same-colored beads together and sort them into their matching color zones!
Step 2 — Build the Picture
As your color sorting progresses, the hidden pixel art design slowly takes shape. Manage your tray space wisely and think ahead — smart planning is the secret to solving each puzzle efficiently.
Step 3 — Complete the Masterpiece
Place the final beads into their perfectly matched color slots and watch the entire canvas light up. Savor that satisfying moment as your pixel art masterpiece is fully revealed!

✨ What Makes Pixel Beads Special
🖼️ Hundreds of Unique Pixel Art Puzzles
From cute animals to fantasy castles, enjoy a huge, ever-growing library of pixel art designs. New themes and limited-time collections are added regularly!
🧩 Puzzle-Solving for All Levels
Simple color sorting eases beginners in, while later stages deliver satisfying puzzle-solving challenges that sharpen focus — never overwhelming, always rewarding.
📴 Play Anywhere — No Wi-Fi Needed
Full offline access anytime. Perfect for commutes, breaks, or winding down before bed.
👨‍👩‍👧 Fun for the Whole Family
Easy color matching for kids, deeper puzzle-solving strategy for adults — casual gameplay everyone will enjoy!

💡 Why You'll Love Pixel Beads
🧠 Gentle Mental Workout: Color sorting and puzzle-solving keep your mind sharp and active.
🌿 Natural Stress Relief: Lose yourself in the calming rhythm of sorting beads and matching colors.
🌈 Satisfying Completion: Nothing beats watching your pixel art snap into place. Pure joy every time!
🎯 Always Something New: Fresh pixel art puzzle collections arrive regularly.

🏆 Features at a Glance
✅ Color sorting & color matching gameplay
✅ Hundreds of pixel art puzzle designs
✅ Beautiful 3D beads with polished visual effects
✅ Relaxing casual gameplay — no time pressure
✅ Regular updates — new themes & limited collections
✅ For all ages and skill levels
✅ 100% offline — no Wi-Fi required

Download Pixel Beads now — sort your 3D beads, master the puzzle-solving, and reveal your pixel art masterpiece today! 🌟

apps.title: Last Shelter: War Z
apps.summary:
The last bastion of humanity has fallen. As the Commander of a final group of survivors, you face a grim new world in the aftermath of doomsday. You hid in an abandoned underground shelter. You must venture into the unknown, reclaim the wasteland, and eradicate the zombie horde. Build your underground stronghold, but remember: survival demands more than walls—it requires expansion, exploration, and relentless combat.​

【BUILD YOUR SURVIVAL SHELTER】
Your underground fortress is the heart of your resistance. Build and customize every room—from Power Generators and Research Labs to Control Centers. Upgrade your facilities to unlock advanced weapons. Design your layout with tactical strategy, because this isn't just a home, it's a war base that fuels your fight to reclaim the world.

【EXPLORE & COLLECT UNDERGROUND】
The real adventure lies in the darkness. Send elite squads into unexplored tunnels and the desolate wastelands shown on your map. Scavenge for vital resources, uncover lost technology, and undertake critical missions to rescue other survivors and search for a cure​ under the zombie horde. Every expedition is a high-stakes mission: stay vigilant—zombies lurk everywhere, and danger strikes without warning.

【FIGHT ZOMBIES】
Combat is brutal and constant. Face off against zombie swarms, terrifying mutant bosses, and other enemy threats lurking in the shadows. Assemble a team of unique heroes, master their powerful abilities, and devise tactical formations to crush your enemies in intense battle. Engage in clashes where you must shoot, fight with guns, and survive enemy fire.

【BASE DEFENSE & TOWER TACTICS】
Your shelter is a prize coveted by all. Defend it from waves of zombies and raids from rival commanders! Construct defensive fortifications, lay cunning traps, and strategically place guard towers to create an impenetrable fortress. Use your radar to detect incoming enemy​ hordes and plan your strategy.

【FORM ALLIANCES FOR DOMINANCE​】
Forge powerful alliances with other players to conquer the wasteland together. Coordinate attacks, share resources, and participate in large-scale alliance wars to dominate the ruined cityscapes. Victory in this endless war belongs to those who unite.

Last Shelter: War Z offers a rich, strategic survival experience with a focus on exploration, combat, and cooperation. The apocalypse was the end of the world, but this is the start of yours. Will you lead humanity to rebirth? Download now and begin your underground odyssey!

You must venture into the unknown, reclaim the wasteland, and eradicate the zombie horde. Build your underground stronghold, but remember: survival demands more than walls—it requires expansion, exploration, and relentless combat.​

【BUILD YOUR SURVIVAL SHELTER】
Your underground fortress is the heart of your resistance. Build and customize every room—from Power Generators and Research Labs to Control Centers. Upgrade your facilities to unlock advanced weapons. Design your layout with tactical strategy, because this isn't just a home, it's a war base that fuels your fight to reclaim the world.

【EXPLORE & COLLECT UNDERGROUND】
The real adventure lies in the darkness. Send elite squads into unexplored tunnels and the desolate wastelands shown on your map. Scavenge for vital resources, uncover lost technology, and undertake critical missions to rescue other survivors and search for a cure​ under the zombie horde. Every expedition is a high-stakes mission: stay vigilant—zombies lurk everywhere, and danger strikes without warning.

【FIGHT ZOMBIES】
Combat is brutal and constant. Face off against zombie swarms, terrifying mutant bosses, and other enemy threats lurking in the shadows. Assemble a team of unique heroes, master their powerful abilities, and devise tactical formations to crush your enemies in intense battle. Engage in clashes where you must shoot, fight with guns, and survive enemy fire.

【BASE DEFENSE & TOWER TACTICS】
Your shelter is a prize coveted by all. Defend it from waves of zombies and raids from rival commanders! Construct defensive fortifications, lay cunning traps, and strategically place guard towers to create an impenetrable fortress. Use your radar to detect incoming enemy​ hordes and plan your strategy.

【FORM ALLIANCES FOR DOMINANCE​】
Forge powerful alliances with other players to conquer the wasteland together. Coordinate attacks, share resources, and participate in large-scale alliance wars to dominate the ruined cityscapes. Victory in this endless war belongs to those who unite.

Last Shelter: War Z offers a rich, strategic survival experience with a focus on exploration, combat, and cooperation. The apocalypse was the end of the world, but this is the start of yours. Will you lead humanity to rebirth? Download now and begin your underground odyssey!

apps.title: Royal Smash! : Physics Puzzle
apps.summary:
Welcome to Royal Smash! — the royal smash festival where every shot is a satisfying smash hit!

Load the royal cannon, line up your angle and power, and smash the whole royal arena to pieces. Fire across the kingdom to smash fragile jars, crush heavy stones, and bring royal towers crashing down in glorious 3D. One clean smash can trigger an unstoppable chain reaction that smashes the entire scene at once.

Easy to play in your first minute, but every royal level rewards precision, timing, and a little destructive genius.

🎯 HOW TO PLAY
• Aim the royal cannon — set the perfect angle and power
• Fire and smash through fragile jars and heavy stones
• Trigger chain reactions to smash everything in one shot
• Clear each stage to unlock the next royal arena

💥 GAME FEATURES
• Satisfying smash physics — every royal smash feels real
• Stunning high-quality 3D graphics and animated festival scenes
• Hundreds of royal levels packed with new objects and challenges
• Simple one-tap controls anyone can smash instantly
• Skill-based aiming that rewards the perfect smash
• Colorful royal kingdoms to demolish, one blast at a time

🏆 WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT
If you love smash games, blast games, and royal destruction challenges, Royal Smash! is your next obsession. Relax with oddly satisfying smashing, or chase the perfect royal smash chain to master every arena.

Grab the royal cannon, aim true, and smash the whole kingdom in Royal Smash!

👑 Download Royal Smash! now and start smashing!

apps.title: BATTLE IN HELL'S PARADISE
apps.summary:
Is this "Hell" or "Paradise"?
An endless battle unfolds in a mysterious yet beautiful land of immortals.
The first game adaptation of the TV anime "Jigokuraku," the survival RPG "Jigokuraku: BATTLE IN HELL'S PARADISE" is now available.

◆Immerse Yourself in the Eerie Beauty of "Shinsenkyo"
Face grotesque monsters and the "Tensen" who rule the island.
In relentless battles that continue day and night across this enigmatic land, gather allies and fight to survive.

◆A New Untold Story in the World of "Hell's Paradise"
Relive the story of the TV anime "Hell's Paradise" with full voice acting.
Supervised by Akira Kindaichi, series composer of the TV anime "Hell's Paradise," this game features fully voiced, completely original stories for every ally.

◆Ninjutsu, Ittō-Ryū, Tao—Wield a Variety of Ultimate Skills
Dynamic battles are brought to life with stunning animation supervised by MAPPA.
Build your own party with unique vicious criminals and executioners, and fight your way through the harsh environment of "Shinsenkyo."

◆Deepen Your Bonds and Survive
By recruiting and enhancing allies, you can earn exclusive titles and items.
You can also enjoy co-op gameplay unique to the game.
As your bonds deepen, unlock new voice lines that reveal hidden sides of your allies...!

apps.title: FIFA Heroes: Football Action
apps.summary:
FIFA Heroes – Arcade Football With Superpowers

Step onto the pitch like never before in FIFA Heroes, the ultimate arcade football game where every match is packed with supercharged action, unique powers, and fast-paced fun. Forget the slow build-up of traditional football – here it’s 5v5 battles, 90 second matches, and nonstop thrills.

Whether you’re pulling off a teleport dribble, blasting a flaming power shot, or using a magnetic tackle to steal the ball, every Hero on your team has special abilities that turn the game upside down. Build your squad, master their skills, and dominate the competition in a brand-new way to play the world’s favorite sport.

Key Features

- Arcade Football Reimagined – No 90-minute grind. Matches are short, explosive, and filled with unpredictable moments. Perfect for gaming on the go.
- Build Your Hero Squad – Collect and upgrade a roster of unique football heroes, each with distinct powers, playstyles, and strengths. Find your perfect combo of striker, defender, midfielder, or all-rounder.
- Superpowers That Change the Game – Freeze opponents in their tracks, unleash unstoppable shots, teleport across the pitch, or shield your goal with magical barriers. The pitch is your playground.
- Global PvP Matches – Take your team online and challenge players worldwide. Climb the ranked leagues from Wooden League to Platinum and beyond, earning rewards, glory, and bragging rights.
- Season Pass Content – Unlock exclusive profile avatars, borders, emojis, balls, and goal celebrations inspired by real legends, clubs, and cultural moments. Every season brings fresh content to keep your game evolving.
- Emotes & Customization – Express yourself with in-game emojis, stylish profile borders, and personalized celebrations. Show your personality on and off the pitch.
- Epic Arenas & Locations – Play football anywhere: on a rooftop in a neon cyberpunk city, in the icy tundras, or under the cosmic glow of the rainbow Bifrost pitch. Each arena brings a new vibe and strategy.
- Easy to Pick Up, Hard to Master – Simple touch controls let anyone jump in, but the depth of combos, team strategy, and power timing makes FIFA Heroes endlessly competitive.

Progression & Rewards

Win matches, climb the leaderboards, and collect Coins and Gems to unlock new Heroes, upgrade abilities, and grab exclusive cosmetics. Complete Challenges, earn Team Points, and stay ahead with regular live events.

Download Now & Become a Hero

The pitch is waiting. The crowd is roaring. It’s time to create your team of football superheroes, outplay your rivals, and become a legend in FIFA Heroes.

apps.title: Traffic Moto Rider City
apps.summary:
Get ready for the ride of a lifetime! Speed down bustling city highways, dodge traffic, and show off your skills in Traffic Moto Rider City. This fast-paced motorcycle racing game brings the excitement of high-speed riding and intense traffic challenges to your fingertips.

Feel the adrenaline as you race against time, maneuver through cars, trucks, and buses in a variety of dynamic environments. With realistic physics, stunning graphics, and immersive sound, every ride in Traffic Moto Rider City is a unique and unforgettable experience.

Game Features:

Endless City Highway Racing 🛣: Take on busy city highways with endless lanes of traffic, testing your reflexes and speed.

Realistic Controls 🎮: Enjoy smooth, responsive controls for a true-to-life motorcycle riding experience.

Wide Selection of Bikes 🏍: Choose from a variety of bikes, each with unique upgrades and color options.

Challenging Traffic 🚗🚙: Navigate through moving traffic, avoid obstacles, and rack up high scores.

Stunning Graphics 🎨: Immerse yourself in vibrant, detailed environments that bring every race to life.

Immersive Sound 🎧: Feel fully immersed with realistic sound effects and engine roars that heighten the excitement.

Multiple Game Modes 🏁: Choose from Career mode, Endless Drive, Time Trial, and Free Ride. You can also pick One-Way or Two-Way traffic modes for even more variety.

Are you ready to prove you're the ultimate rider? Grab your bike, hit the city highways, and dominate the road in Traffic Moto Rider City!

apps.title: Steelborn: Tank Idle RPG
apps.summary:
Gear up for tank battles in Tank Idle RPG, the ultimate build your tank game! Equip your warrior tank and duke it out in world of warriors duels as you explore dungeons and win big in the PVP arena.

This idle tank building game allows you to forge equipment to deck out your tank, starting from the lowly raw junk category all the way up to transcendent. Along the way you’ll be able to engage in regular battles as well as take part in dungeon raids and participate in PvP arena fights. The perfect combo of idle gameplay and focused power awaits you in Tank Idle RPG!

CUSTOMIZE YOUR TANK
Heat up your forge and churn out equipment to upgrade your tank. As you progress and consolidate your strategy, focus on which upgrades matter the most to you and help you win the most battles.

DUELS AND BATTLES
Tank Idle RPG has all manner of battles awaiting you and your tank, ranging from your standard level battles where you’ll work your forge for equipment to world of warriors duels and PvP arena fights where you can duke it out to claim valuable rewards. Plus check out the dungeons and put your tank to the ultimate test!
DANK DUNGEONS – Keep your eyes peeled for the special key to drop, as this will get you into the dungeon where, if your tank survives, you’re sure to win big and stock up on resources.

AUTO-FORGE ON

apps.title: Race Star - Team Manager Game
apps.summary:
Build the Ultimate Racing Dynasty!

Take the wheel and become the ultimate team boss in Race Star! Sign legendary drivers, tune your machines, and build a championship-winning garage across six high-octane racing classes. Whether you are screaming down the straightaway in an open-wheel rocket or crushing the competition in a monster truck, your strategic calls are the only thing standing between your team and racing glory.

As the team owner, you control every part of the operation. Scout fresh talent, set your starting driver, and train raw rookies into world-class champions. Best of all? The engines never stop. Watch your race plan come to life in thrilling automated race simulations, and keep banking idle cash even while you are away!

6 EPIC RACING DISCIPLINES IN 1 GAME

Why master just one kind of racing? Build unstoppable teams across Open-Wheel Racing, Stock Cars, Rally, Superbikes, Speedsters, and Monster Trucks! Every discipline brings its own drivers, machines, and tracks to conquer.

COLLECT, TRAIN & UPGRADE (IDLE PROGRESSION)

Pull new drivers into your collection and pour your idle profits into training them and maxing out their stats. Unlock deep skill trees and find the perfect driver synergy to outpace the field. Your team keeps grinding and winning races in the background, so you always come back to massive idle rewards!

CLIMB THE CHAMPIONSHIP LEAGUES

Start at the back of the grid and finish the season on top to promote into higher, tougher leagues. Every podium pushes your team up the ranks. Earn trophies, chase the title, and cement your legacy as the greatest garage in the world.

MERGE GEAR FOR MASSIVE BOOSTS

Collect powerful racing gear after every win. Use the advanced merge system to combine parts, unlock rare equipment, and give your drivers the ultimate competitive edge on the track!

UNLOCK SEASONAL EVENTS & OFFERS

Climb the battle pass, chase rotating driver banners, and grab limited-time deals that keep every season fresh. There is always a new reward to race for.

Do you have what it takes to build an unstoppable idle racing dynasty? Download Race Star now and start your first season!

apps.title: AltLife Sim
apps.summary:
How will you live your AltLife? By the book, or off script?

In AltLife Sim, you can play the classic way: make quick choices, climb the corporate ladder, find love, and create a legacy. But now, you aren't limited to the buttons on the screen.

Don't see the option you want? Write it yourself.

If the game gives you three choices, but you’re thinking of a fourth - type it in. Whether it’s a witty comeback, a bizarre crime, or a romantic gesture nobody else would think of, the story moments are only limited to your imagination!

A Life Simulator Without Limits:

You Choose the Words: Don't just select "Ask them out." Type exactly what you want to say to your crush and see how they react to your specific charm (or lack of it!).

Invent New Activities: Bored of the standard gym or movie dates? Create your own activities. Take your friends "Under water basket weaving" or "Ghost hunting in an abandoned mall." If you can think it, you can do it.

True Roleplay: Follow the path laid out for you, or break away entirely to forge a story that is uniquely yours.

Standard life sims give you a menu. AltLife Sim gives you the pen.

Will you be a model citizen who follows the rules? Or will you be the wild card that the world never saw coming?

Download now and tell your own stories.

apps.title: Fun Mahjong Match
apps.summary:
Fun Mahjong Match is a top-tier tile-matching puzzle game that combines classic mahjong solitaire charm with modern, user-centric innovations. Designed for all players, especially casual users and seniors, it features oversized tiles, a clean minimalist interface and smooth controls, delivering a comfortable, eye-protecting gaming experience on all phones and tablets. Our game focuses on relaxing entertainment and lightweight brain training, letting players unwind and sharpen their mind in free time without stress.

We dedicate to developing warm, accessible casual puzzle games for every player. We focus on simple, fun and low-threshold game experiences, bringing steady relaxation and joy to global puzzle lovers with our diverse and well-polished game works.

How to Play Fun Mahjong Match
Fun Mahjong Match features ultra-simple gameplay with zero learning cost. Your goal is to clear all tiles on the board. Just tap or drag two identical tiles that can be connected in a straight line . Clear all tiles on the board to complete the level successfully! With scientifically progressive difficulty designs, the game offers both casual relaxation and moderate logical challenges, suitable for players of all skill levels.

Exclusive Game Features of Fun Mahjong Match
•Classic Mahjong Solitaire Gameplay: Stay true to the classic mahjong matching rules, with authentic traditional tile sets and hundreds of elaborate board layouts. Experience the timeless fun of classic mahjong solitaire.

•Unique Innovative Tile Mechanics: Beyond classic gameplay, we add exclusive special tiles and creative level mechanisms. The fresh gameplay twists avoid monotony and bring brand-new matching fun for veteran players.

•Ultra-Large & High-Definition Tiles: Equipped with enlarged high-clarity tiles and soft color schemes, effectively reducing eye strain. The senior-friendly visual design ensures easy recognition and comfortable long-time gaming.

•Professional Brain Training Mode: Custom brain exercise levels help improve your observation, concentration and memory. Train your brain casually and keep your mind sharp every day.

•Stress-Free Free Game Mode: No mandatory timer or score ranking pressure! You can play at your own pace with customized game settings, enjoying pure and relaxing mahjong matching fun.

•Fantastic Super Combo System: Get continuous matching combos during the game to trigger special visual effects and hidden bonuses. Accumulate combos to gain a strong sense of achievement.

•Free Practical Game Props: Free built-in props including hints, shuffle help you solve tricky levels easily. No in-app purchase required for basic auxiliary functions.

•Daily Challenge & Rewards: Fresh daily challenges are waiting for you every day. Complete tasks to collect exclusive trophies and rich rewards, and upgrade your matching skills step by step.

•100% Offline Game Support: Fully supports offline gameplay. Enjoy unlimited mahjong matching fun anytime, anywhere without an internet connection.

•Full Multi-Device Optimization: Perfectly adapted to all mobile phones and tablets. The adaptive layout and fluent operation bring a stable and high-quality gaming experience for all users.

Fun Mahjong Match is an ideal casual puzzle game for the whole family. It is perfect for killing time, relaxing mood and exercising your brain. Download Fun Mahjong Match right now and start your relaxing mahjong matching journey!

Note: This is a mahjong solitaire-style tile-matching puzzle game. It does not contain the rules of traditional competitive mahjong or other types of card games and solitaire games. The term "Mahjong" in the game only represents the visual style of the in-game tiles.

apps.title: Vita Sort
apps.summary:
Vita Sort - Exclusive Puzzle, Strategic Categorization
Vita Sort is an exclusive Mahjong tile categorization puzzle game. We are thrilled to present this fresh title that blends classic Mahjong visual art with innovative gameplay. Featuring clear, large Mahjong tiles and a user-friendly interface compatible with phones, our goal is to provide a relaxing yet mentally engaging experience for all players, particularly focused on older adults.
How to Play Vita Sort:
Playing Vita Sort is intuitive, with its core mechanics centered around your meticulous observation, clever categorization, and strategic tapping to effectively manage the tiles and collection areas.
1. Tap to Collect: Tap any available Mahjong tile on the board, and it will first move into the temporary tray at the bottom.
2. Activate & Categorize:
- The top of the screen features 3 main category slots, displaying active Mahjong tile categories and their collection progress (e.g., "Characters 2/4").
- When a Mahjong tile enters the temporary tray, if it belongs to a category already represented in one of the main category slots, all matching tiles in the tray will automatically categorize and count towards that main slot's progress.
- If the tile belongs to a new major category and there's an empty main category slot at the top, that new category will be activated and occupy a slot.
3. Complete & Clear: Once the number of Mahjong tiles in a main category slot reaches its target requirement, that category will be fully collected and disappear from the slot, freeing up space for new categories.
4. Strategic Planning: The temporary tray has limited space. You need to plan your taps in advance, ensuring each tap effectively contributes to completing a main category. Avoid filling the tray with too many un-categorizable tiles, which could lead to a stalled game.
5. Clear the Board Challenge: Your ultimate goal is to use your wisdom to gradually clear all Mahjong tiles from the board, successfully completing each level!
Exclusive Vita Sort Game Features:
- "Tile Fusion Sort" Innovative Gameplay: Moving beyond traditional matching, we introduce the unique "Tile Fusion Sort" innovative gameplay. This is more than just simple sorting; it's a comprehensive test of your ability to quickly identify, precisely categorize, and strategically plan your moves.
- Classic Mahjong Art Style: The game features classic Mahjong tile visuals, paired with hundreds of meticulously designed board layouts, offering a familiar yet fresh visual feast.
- Large-Scale, Easy-to-Read Design: Designed with players in mind, we use large, clear, and easy-to-read Mahjong tiles and text, allowing you to say goodbye to the strain of small fonts and fully enjoy a comfortable game.
- Mentally Engaging Levels: Each level is thoughtfully designed to activate your mind, helping you enhance your categorization thinking, observation skills, concentration, and short-term memory in a relaxed and enjoyable atmosphere.
- Super Combo Experience: When you cleverly strategize to trigger a continuous collection and elimination of many Mahjong tiles in one go, you'll unlock a thrilling Super Combo, gaining extraordinary game satisfaction and rewards!
- Helpful Auxiliary Tools: The game provides free and useful tools, such as the Undo function to correct mistakes, and the Shuffle tool to open up new possibilities, helping you overcome challenging situations.
- Offline Mode: Full offline support lets you immerse yourself in the fun of Vita Sort anytime, anywhere, without needing an internet connection.
Vita Sort is a meticulously crafted puzzle masterpiece designed for players who love strategic categorization and visual puzzle-solving games.
Note: This is a puzzle game in the style of Mahjong tiles, focused on categorization. It does not contain the rules of traditional Mahjong, Mahjong Solitaire, or other types of card games. The term “Mahjong” here refers solely to the visual style of the tiles.

apps.title: Ultimate 11
apps.summary:
⚽ THE GREATEST XI OF ALL TIME. CAN YOU BUILD IT?

Every football fan has had the argument. Who makes your dream team? Now you get to settle it on the pitch. Draft legendary players from international tournaments past, lock in your formation, and find out if your Ultimate 11 has what it takes to be crowned world champion.

Part fantasy squad builder, part knowledge test, 100% football. Quick to play, impossible to put down.

🎮 HOW IT WORKS
1. Pick your mode: Classic or Soccer IQ.
2. Choose your formation (start with a classic 4-3-3 or build your own shape).
3. Spin to draw a nation and an era.
4. Pick one legend from that squad.
5. Slot them into an open position on the pitch.
6. Repeat until all 11 spots are filled.
7. Simulate your tournament run and chase the trophy.

Every spin is different, so no two squads are ever the same. One run you build around a rock-solid defense, the next you stack the most lethal attack the game has ever seen.

🧠 TWO WAYS TO PLAY

💯 Classic
All the stats, right in front of you. Compare ratings, weigh your options, and draft the smartest XI on the planet. Built for managers who love the numbers.

🧠 Soccer IQ
Stats hidden. This is where the real fans separate themselves. Draft from memory, trust your gut, and prove you actually know your football history. No ratings, no safety net, just you and your knowledge.

🏆 WHY YOU WILL LOVE IT
- Draft the icons. Build your fantasy XI from legends who lit up the world stage across decades of international football.
- Real tactical depth. Your formation and your positioning decide everything. Pick the right players for the right roles.
- Endless replayability. Random nation and era draws mean a fresh soccer draft every single time you play.
- Climb the global leaderboard. Stack your best runs against players around the world and prove you belong at the top.
- Test your football brain. Soccer IQ mode turns every pick into the ultimate trivia challenge.
- Free to play. Jump in, build a squad, and chase glory in minutes.

🌍 FROM KICKOFF TO CHAMPIONS
Whether you live for the tactics, the nostalgia, or the bragging rights, Ultimate 11 is made for you. Recreate dream teams from football's golden eras, take on fans across the globe, and write your name at the top of the leaderboard.

The whistle has blown. Your squad is waiting.
Draft the legends. Build your Ultimate 11. Become a world champion.

📲 Download now and start building your Ultimate 11.

Join the community on Discord, X (@Ultimate11GG), and Instagram (@Ultimate11GG).

Fight on the front line as an elite sniper while commanding the battle on a larger scale. Experience a seamless blend of intense tactical shooting and real-time strategy.

🎯 One Shot to Turn the Tide
• High-Stakes Sniping: Eliminate key targets to break through enemy defenses. One perfect shot can shift the momentum of an entire battle.

apps.title: Game Is Hard
apps.summary:
Game is Hard is not your typical puzzle app. This is a pure brain puzzle experience designed for players who love being challenged. With its clever, minimalist style and unexpected interactions, it blends elements of brain games, logic, and device-based exploration into a collection of brutally tricky levels and hard puzzle challenges, creating a unique hard puzzle game experience.

Every puzzle breaks the rules, no flashy animations, no rewards for guessing. Just you, your mind, and a seemingly simple task that might hide a brilliant, almost impossible solution. Whether you’re into strategy, trivia games, or iq test challenges, Game is Hard invites you to test your patience, perception, and persistence in a truly engaging hard puzzle game.

This is not about fast reflexes. It’s about slow, methodical progress. Some levels require silence. Others need movement. Many seem unsolvable, until they’re not. It’s a place for deep thinking and bold experimentation. Hints are available when needed, but progress is always earned.

If you've enjoyed titles like brain test games, logic puzzles, IQ tests, moron test or brain teaser games, and if you love dissecting a good tricky quest, this game is for you. It rewards those who think differently, the curious, the clever, the quietly stubborn.

With full support for offline games, you can play wherever and whenever you want, perfect for no wifi games, no internet games, or long travel sessions. Whether you're on airplane mode or deep underground, all puzzles remain playable.

And yes, it’s hard. In fact, some say it's difficult, others call it impossible. But every puzzle is built with purpose and can be solved with logic. Each hard level is designed to challenge your thinking in a unique way. If you're a fan of brain training, mind games, or just enjoy testing your limits, you'll find yourself right at home.

Each level is full of hidden ideas and clever mechanics waiting to be discovered. You'll experiment with sound, light, rotation, and pressure, even waiting. Solutions are not always obvious. But when you find them, the satisfaction is incredible, making it a memorable hard puzzle game experience.

Designed for fans of both classic and modern puzzle games, Game is Hard avoids the noise of the typical mobile fun games and focuses instead on clarity, challenge, and meaningful interaction. There’s no time pressure. No ads. No noise. Just deep puzzles that respect your intelligence.
Whether you see yourself as a genius, an impulse problem-solver, or simply someone who enjoys a good brainly test, this game invites you to try. And try again. And maybe finally succeed.

Features:
• Handcrafted brain puzzle levels with clever, logical solutions
• Challenging hard puzzle mechanics and unique level design
• Hints are available, but never obvious
• Works fully offline, great for no wifi games and free play
• Minimalist, flat design with zero distractions
• Touch, motion, and sound-based mechanics
• Built for players who enjoy hard, clever, and unusual challenges
• No scores or timers, just pure gameplay

The title of Apex Hunter isn't bestowed. It's earned—one bullet at a time.

Step into the world's most breathtaking wildernesses and become the most elite hunter on Earth. In **Apex Hunter: Animal Shooting**, every hunt is the ultimate test of skill, precision, and will. From the scorching savannas of Africa to the frozen tundra of the Arctic, from the dense forests of North America to the rugged highlands of Asia, the world's most dangerous prey is waiting for you to pull the trigger.

Explore hyper-realistic environments spanning the globe. These aren't just stunning landscapes; they are living arenas where every terrain demands a different strategy. Pull off long-range precision shots across open plains, track prey with patience through dense jungles, and push your accuracy to the limit in the biting cold of the tundra. Every hunting ground is a unique conquest and a true test of what you're made of.

**🦁 30+ Wild Animals**
Face Earth's deadliest creatures. Track down white-tailed deer, grizzly bears, mountain lions, moose, wolves, lions, leopards, crocodiles, wild boars, buffalo, and more! Every species moves and behaves differently. A successful hunt demands more than just aiming—you must read your prey, adapt your strategy, and seize control of the situation.

One shot. One kill. Perfected. Every shot in Apex Hunter pushes your focus and technique to the limit. Enjoy silky-smooth weapon handling and true-to-life precision where distance, wind, and timing make the difference between a shot and a missed opportunity. Precision isn't just a skill; it's the hunter's only language.

**🏹 Build Your Ultimate Arsenal**
There is no room for compromise in an apex hunter's arsenal. Unlock and upgrade a continuously expanding lineup of precision rifles and sniper weapons. Adapt your loadout to the terrain and the target in front of you. The arsenal of a true hunter never settles and never stops evolving.

**🔥 Varied Hunting Scenarios**
Aim like a sniper. Think like a tactician. Stay sharp and composed under pressure: fend off ferocious animal attacks, defend farms from predator invasions, and protect civilians caught in dangerous wildlife encounters. Every scenario demands a unique response. Only those who stay calm in every situation truly earn the title.

**🕹️ Drone Recon & Trap Tactics**

Transform a modest station into a prestigious law enforcement headquarters!

1. Design & Build Your Police HQ
Build an empire of justice from the ground up! Freely arrange facilities such as interrogation rooms, holding cells, and armories to optimize investigations. Every brick you lay brings the city closer to order.

2. Recruit Officers & Upgrade Gear
Assemble a dream team of elite officers to dismantle criminal schemes. Invest resources in advanced weaponry and vehicles to handle escalating threats.

3. Investigate Cases Strategically
Intimidation or incentives? Choose interrogation strategies and adapt your approach to each suspect. As your caseload grows, you’ll face off against notorious criminals and deploy SWAT teams to bring them to justice!

4. Manage Inmates
More inmates mean more federal funding, but they also require meticulous oversight. Classify inmates by risk level, assign them to segregated housing, and maintain vigilant patrols to prevent jailbreaks.

5. Crush Prison Riots
Poor meals, cramped cells, or lax surveillance can spark violent uprisings. Mobilize rapid-response teams in riot gear to suppress them before they tank your reputation and funding!

Key Features:

Strategic Depth: Balance budget, reputation, and security in a dynamic crime ecosystem.
Progression System: Evolve from a rundown precinct to a high-tech law enforcement center.
Realistic Challenges: Adapt to gang wars, hostage crises, and corruption scandals.
Can you bring the streets back from the brink? The city’s fate rests in your hands.

apps.summary:
Alert commander, ww3 just began! Red threat is back! We need your command to conquer the red enemy once again. Show the enemy generals your art of war, command our units and lead us to victory in ww3 in this classic inspired RTS - real time strategy game.
The war has returned. Enemy forces are moving across the battlefield, rival generals are preparing their next strike, and every decision can change the future of the campaign. Take command, upgrade your army, strengthen your generals, and prove that your strategy and art of war can conquer every battlefield.
Red Command - War Alert RTS brings the spirit of classic war strategy into fast tactical battles made for mobile. Build your power, conquer the battlefield, lead your army, unlock new upgrades, and push through a full war campaign where smart decisions matter more than brute force.
BECOME THE COMMANDER
The battlefield needs a leader. As commander, you are responsible for every mission, every upgrade, and every victory. Plan your next move, improve your forces, and use your tactical sense to outplay enemy generals. The red enemy is strong, but a true commander knows how to turn pressure into victory.
UPGRADE POWERFUL GENERALS
Your generals are the key to victory. Upgrade their power, improve their abilities, and prepare them for harder missions. Every stronger general gives you more control over the battlefield and helps you conquer tougher rivals. Choose your upgrades wisely and build an army worthy of command.
CONQUER THE BATTLEFIELD
Every battle is a test of your strategy. Enemy units will try to break your advance, rival commanders will challenge your army, and new missions will demand better planning. Use your resources, improve your units, and conquer each battlefield step by step. Victory belongs to the commander who adapts.
CLASSIC WAR STRATEGY FEEL
Do you miss classic strategy games with soldiers, tanks, generals, upgrades, blue vs. red and large war campaigns? Red Command - War Alert RTS is built for players who love tactical decisions, army progression, battlefield action, and the feeling of commanding a real war machine.
This is a classic inspired strategy experience with modern mobile pacing. Easy to start, satisfying to progress, and challenging enough for players who want to master every mission.
REAL-TIME STRATEGY ACTION
Stay alert, because war does not wait. Battles move quickly, enemy forces react, and your command decisions happen in real time. Improve your army, conquer strong positions, use the right tactics, and push your forces toward victory. Every mission brings action, pressure, and the chance to prove your skill as a commander.
BUILD YOUR WAR MACHINE
A strong army is not created in one battle. Upgrade your units, improve your generals, collect rewards, and unlock more power as the campaign againts red enemy grows. The deeper you go, the stronger the red enemy becomes. Keep improving your strategy and prepare for the next strategy challenge.
FIGHT ENEMY GENERALS
You are not fighting simple soldiers. Enemy generals are leading their own armies and trying to stop your rise. Outsmart them, overpower them, and show them who controls the battlefield. Each victory brings you closer to total domination.
CONQUER THE LEADERBOARD
Conquer rivals and rise through the rankings. Upgrade your generals, complete missions, win battles, and prove that your command belongs among the best. The leaderboard is waiting for commanders who can combine smart strategy with unstoppable ambition.
WHY PLAY RED COMMAND - WAR ALERT RTS?
• Classic inspired war strategy gameplay
• Real-time tactical battles
• Generals to upgrade and command
• Army progression and powerful upgrades
• Soldiers, tanks, and battlefield action
• War campaign full of missions
• Competitive leaderboard progression
• Easy to play, hard to master
• Made for fans of classic RTS and war strategy games

Download now and become the commander your army needs.

apps.title: Shadowborn
apps.summary:
Shadowborn is an arcade-style RPG designed for fast, gripping mobile gameplay. Dive into a rich world of whimsy and darkness letting you carve your path to victory, whether it's a quick battle or a longer, more immersive quest.

Experience pure power fantasy with tight, short game loops that pack in excitement. Move seamlessly through vibrant landscapes, tackle fast-paced missions, and engage in combat that's responsive and satisfying. The game rewards your skill, allowing you to dodge attacks and time your take-downs to win against the odds.


UNLEASH YOUR POWER
Step into a world of fantasy as a hero uniquely tailored to your style:
• Select from distinctive classes like the Warrior, Rogue, Sorcerer, Necromancer, Swashbuckler, and Valkyrie — each with a unique feel and powerful abilities.
• Experiment with a multi-class system allowing you blend abilities from different achetypes and create a truly unique warrior.
• Explore the different skill trees to unlock powerful synergies and legendary skills, making every playthrough unique.

SECRETS EVERYWHERE
The world is filled with hidden discoveries waiting to be found:
• Pull the legendary Sword in the Stone, unlock sliding bookcases, and walk the Path of Fire.
• Solve the Weeping Angel puzzle, discover what waits for you beyond the Looking Glass.
• Find the Veiled Temples, Pirate Caves, and the horrors of the Baron's Laboratory.
• Track your progress - the map shows how many secrets remain in each area.

DARK AND WHIMSICAL WORLD
Encounter a world of contrasts, where light and darkness dance:
• Explore haunted graveyards, abandoned churches, eerie swamps, mysterious lagoons, treacherous pirate caves, and ancient mines.
• Face the darkness: battle skeletal hordes, giant spiders, oozing slimes, fire elementals, spectral wraiths, and carnivorous plants.
• Confront epic bosses like the Brood Mother, Lich Lord, Pirate Captain, and the mysterious Baron von Darkwood.
• Discover serene moments with unicorns in sunlit glades and mermaids offering riddles by moonlit waterfalls.

ARCADE-INSPIRED COMBAT
Feel the thrill of smooth, responsive controls that adapt to your style:
• Choose between arcade and dual-stick control options for a flexible experience that feels great in your hands.
• Engage in satisfying, responsive combat that makes every fight feel impactful, like an arcade brawler in a fantasy world.
• Hire mercenaries to fight alongside you, raise the dead as a Necromancer, or ride into battle on horseback.

ENDLESS REPLAYABILITY
Your journey doesn't end at victory:
• Unlock heirlooms and a retirement system, encouraging fresh playthroughs and new challenges.
• Choose from many side quests: Solve mermaid riddles, explore the Sunken Citadel, and piece together the secrets of the mysterious Esmeralda
• Power up with new gear, refined strategies, and complete achievements

READY FOR ANY PLAYTIME
Quick missions that deliver big on action:
• 3-4 minute loops offer bite-sized, high-energy action perfect for mobile.
• Each mission drops you instantly into the heart of the action, keeping every session short and intense.

Embrace the whimsy and darkness of Shadowborn — an arcade RPG crafted for mobile players who crave fast-paced action in a world as enchanting as it is deadly. Download now and begin your journey!

apps.title: Arrows Dash
apps.summary:
Welcome to Arrows Dash! A sleek yet captivating logic puzzle game that blends strategic thinking with soothing gameplay. It is designed to sharpen your mind while offering a peaceful escape from the hustle and bustle of daily life. More than just a casual pastime, Arrows Dash delivers a thoughtfully crafted gaming experience. Every move matters, every decision tests your foresight, and every puzzle solved brings a deeply satisfying sense of accomplishment. Whether you are a seasoned puzzle enthusiast in search of new challenges or a casual player looking for a relaxing way to keep your mind active, Arrows Dash invites you to dive into a world of minimalist design, ingenious mechanics, and endless logical fun.
At its core, Arrows Dash features a deceptively simple rule set: tap and swipe the arrows to move them along their designated directions, and guide all arrows off the grid. Yet do not be fooled by its straightforward appearance. What starts out as an effortless task will soon evolve into a true strategic challenge. A single misstep can trap your arrows, forcing you to rethink your approach and plan every move with precision. Unlike fast-paced action games that demand quick reflexes, this game features a stress-free, timer-free design. Play at your own pace, experiment with different strategies, and savor the calming journey of solving each puzzle.
Our team has poured passion into crafting over 3,000 meticulously designed levels. Each stage is tailored to challenge your logical reasoning, spatial awareness and critical thinking without overwhelming pressure. The game boasts a smooth, intuitive difficulty curve: begin with basic grids featuring only a single arrow to clear, then gradually progress to intricate layouts filled with multi-directional arrows, tricky pathways and cleverly placed obstacles that push your strategic skills to the limit. Every level is entirely unique — no random generation, no repetitive patterns — ensuring every puzzle feels fresh, fair and rewarding. As you advance to higher difficulties, you will navigate expansive grids that stretch beyond a single screen. Drag to explore the full map, adding extra depth and dimension to your puzzle-solving adventure.

apps.title: NTE: Neverness to Everness
apps.summary:
NTE is a supernatural open-world RPG developed by Hotta Studio. The story begins in the city of Hethereau, where you play as its first "unlicensed" Anomaly Hunter. You'll join the crew at Eibon, a rundown antique shop that keeps the lights on by taking Anomaly commissions from anyone willing to pay. Alongside a diverse cast of extraordinary companions, you'll unravel urban mysteries, ride out adventures full of laughs and heartbreak, and write your own stories in the neon-lit streets.

◆ Strange City, Strange Adventures

Welcome to the first stop in your appraisal career—Hethereau, a sprawling and vibrant metropolis!

In the crowded halls of the Bureau of Anomaly Control, hopeful Oddities queue up for resident permits, while over at the train station, an Esper commuter snaps his fingers to clean his work suit on the fly. Down one block, a chaotic chase after Danzaburou is spiraling out of control; while across the street, a vacationing silver-gloved Butler is shooting the breeze with the owner of a second-hand electronics shop. Everywhere you look, there's no shortage of intriguingly "abnormal" scenes.

Want to dive deeper into a world where humans and the supernatural coexist? Start your journey in Hethereau to see it for yourself. The lively and quirky daily life here is a grand adventure in itself.

◆ Interesting Stories, Lighthearted Connections

Today's Top Story: Rumors are swirling about a mysterious pawnshop that only appears on the night of the full moon. What would you trade for a wish?

Breaking News: Taygedo's romance crisis! Romance and impulse, heartbreak and missed chances—Miss Tako, the object of a secret crush, is about to leave Hethereau with her guarantor. How will the lovestruck otter get his feelings across before it's too late?

Reliable Insider Tip: Film Orbit Studio is back in business! Members of the Eibon Antique Shop get exclusive discounts!

Weather Update: The Anomaly Rainman is entering an active phase—don't forget your rain gear on the way out!

That wraps up today's 10AM broadcast. Stay tuned for mysterious Anomalies, unbreakable "Oaths," and the ever-growing shadow of the colossal "Circle" organization, looming larger in the fragmented echoes of "Prophecies"...

◆ Encounters and Bonds

Explore hidden shops tucked away in back alleys and meet their enigmatic owners, along with absurdly overpowered bodyguards, "jack-of-all-trades" robotic butlers, troublemakers who can't help finding problems, and TV-headed repairmen with some very curious eating habits.

As part of the Eibon crew, you'll never be short on energetic companions for the road ahead.

Expand your social circle starting from the bustling Hankaku Street! Meet members from different factions and add them as "Bagel" friends!

From the tight-knit neighborhood of street shops to the city's unique hunter organizations, countless side stories await—ready for you to make friends and forge bonds across every corner of Hethereau.

◆ Customize Your Urban Lifestyle

Explore the city on your own terms—stick to familiar routines or shake things up.

Customize your ride and tear through the city streets, or hop on the Ghost Train to cut through Anomaly space and arrive in a flash.

In your downtime, swing by the old shops on Hankaku Street to browse their secret seasonal stock, or buy a cozy little home and deck it out to your liking.

Go at your own pace, follow your instincts, and let Hethereau reward you with colorful days worth remembering.
Follow our official channels for the latest on NTE!

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@NTE_Official
X: https://x.com/NTE_GL
Discord: https://discord.gg/nte

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ntegame.official/

apps.title: Sword x Staff
apps.summary:
Sword x Staff is a one-of-a-kind RPG — a “Third Way RPG.”
Strategy, massive world exploration, idle—why pick one when you can have it all?
Go hardcore, or just vibe—either way, you’ll find your own kind of fun here. The kind that actually feels different.
No pressure, no one way to play—just jump in, explore, and let the adventure click your way.
Curious what the gameplay is really like?
So, welcome to the unique world of Kanstein, and experience the one-of-a-kind Third Way adventure. Here, you are the Chosen Adventurer transported to this isekai! Team up with the Staff and Sword Twins and dive into a quest to save the world. Pierce through thick fog, dig up forgotten treasures, and explore a huge interactive world at your own pace. Mix and match over 200 skills to create a fighting style that’s uniquely yours. Best of all, you’ll meet amazing allies to fight by your side against legendary Hieromons! Of course—Remember, all of this can be enjoyed completely pressure-free, since the idle gameplay making resource gathering a breeze！
[Idle Game, but with a massive interactive world]
Most idle games have you waiting. Sword x Staff lets you actually go somewhere.
Step into a huge world map where every region has its own vibe and secrets to uncover. Roam the lush wilds of Verdantglade, face the clash of steel and instinct in Cinder Ridge, drift through the mist-shrouded waters of Aqualis, and uncover the ancient bronze ruins hidden within Loong Haven.
Every region brings new sights, companions, treasures, and those "just one more look" moments. And even when you're offline, your adventure doesn't stop. Resources keep piling up while you rest, and the Traveling Merchant shows up with rare goods while you're away. Log back in, cash out, and keep going.
[Deep strategy, but easy to jump in]
Strategy is fun because of freedom, not because it needs a spreadsheet.
Everything starts with the classic Warrior & Mage dual-class system, branching into 200+ skill combinations and playstyles. Mix skills, change cast order, swap elemental builds, and fine-tune your setup however you like.
No fixed meta. No single "right" answer. Just true variety and real flexibility, and plenty of room to experiment.
Keep it casual, or go full theorycraft mode. How deep you go is completely up to you.
[Progress Without the Grind]
Power up without the endless farming. Even while you're offline, resources stack up, characters grow stronger, and progression keeps moving.
Lie back, rest up, and wake up stronger! Watch clouds drift across the Floating Islands, stargaze from your cozy cabin, hunt for hidden treasure, or level up while doing absolutely nothing heroic for a minute.
Easy progress, low stress, steady rewards—that's what we call relaxed, efficient progression
[Auto-Battles Are Easy, But Never Boring]
Tired of idle games where heroes just stand still? Here, AI-driven characters adapt to the battlefield—repositioning, predicting enemies, chasing targets, and unleashing ultimate skills. Auto-battles aren’t boring—they’re tactical, flashy, and full of epic combos.
[Unique avatars, without looking the same]
Your avatar is yours, full stop. Go bold with wild hairstyles, unusual features, standout looks, or choices that are a little chaotic in the best way. Make something cool, weird, stylish, hilarious—or all four at once! No "same face, different outfit." Make it 100% original. Walk into town and stand out. In Kanstein, being unforgettable is part of the fun.

apps.title: Game of Thrones: Dragonfire
apps.summary:
Command legendary dragons, forge powerful alliances, and conquer the Seven Kingdoms in the ultimate Game of Thrones strategy game. Build your empire, raise a fearsome dragon army, and wage RTS war across Westeros to claim the Iron Throne. Game of Thrones: Dragonfire is an epic 4X strategy war game where you lead your House through conquest, diplomacy, and dragon warfare in the most immersive medieval fantasy game on mobile.

COLLECT & COMMAND MIGHTY DRAGONS
Hatch, train, and command legendary dragons. Battle with Syrax, Caraxes, Seasmoke, and more. Each dragon possesses unique abilities to turn the tide of tactical warfare. Build an unstoppable dragon army, collect rare species, and evolve them into forces of pure destruction to dominate the skies of Westeros.

WAGE EPIC STRATEGIC WARFARE
Lead your armies in high-stakes PvP war and real time strategy combat. Lay siege to enemy strongholds, defend your castle, and outmaneuver rival Houses in thrilling battles. Whether engaging in PvE campaigns or global clan wars, your mastery of RTS mechanics and cunning strategy will determine who reigns supreme.

BUILD & UPGRADE YOUR KINGDOM
Master base building as you grow a small stronghold into an unassailable fortress. Manage vital resources to fuel your conquest of Westeros and train elite troops in this thrilling battle game. Effective kingdom management and defensive upgrades are the keys to surviving the brutal politics of the Seven Kingdoms.

CONQUER THE SEVEN KINGDOMS
Explore a detailed map of Westeros featuring iconic landmarks like the Red Keep, Dragonstone, and Harrenhal. Expand your empire across legendary regions, conquer rival territories, and control the most powerful strongholds in the realm. In this MMO strategy world, every territory claimed brings you closer to the Iron Throne.

DISCOVER EPIC STORYLINES
Step into the official game of the HBO show House of the Dragon, set 172 years before Daenerys Targaryen. Immerse yourself in a narrative-rich campaign where your decisions shape the destiny of the realm. Interact with iconic characters like Rhaenyra Targaryen and Daemon Targaryen in a story filled with the drama, betrayal, and intrigue that defines Game of Thrones.

FORGE MULTIPLAYER ALLIANCES
Join forces with players worldwide in this massive multiplayer strategy MMO. Coordinate grand strategies with your alliance, dominate the world map, and wage war against rival factions. In a land of shifting loyalties, strong diplomacy and coordinated alliance warfare are essential to securing your legacy.

WHY PLAY GAME OF THRONES: DRAGONFIRE?
• The Definitive GoT Strategy Game: Officially licensed medieval fantasy RPG and war game.
• Deep 4X Gameplay: Explore, expand, exploit and exterminate in a massive world.
• Stunning Visuals: High-fidelity graphics bring the dragons and strongholds of Westeros to life.
• Live Events: Regular updates featuring new dragons, seasonal events, and storylines.
• Global PvP: Compete against thousands of strategists in real-time throne battles.

Download Game of Thrones: Dragonfire now and begin your conquest! The battle for the Seven Kingdoms has begun; Will you command the fire and claim the throne?

apps.title: Meowdoku: Brain Puzzle Games
apps.summary:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.
Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
💡 Simple Rules, Deep Strategy
The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!
✨ Key Features
🐾 Pure & Immersive Experience
- Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
- Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.
📅 Daily Brain Teasers
- Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
- Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards.
❤️ Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone
Meowdoku won't hijack your attention with tedious social mechanics or endless daily grinds—it earns your love through pure gameplay quality. With its minimalist aesthetic and satisfying tactile feedback, it takes just seconds to learn. Yet, long after you put your phone down, its elegant logic loop will keep lingering in your mind.
Ready for a brain-teasing puzzle adventure filled with adorable felines?
Download Meowdoku now, put your logic to the test, and become the ultimate feline puzzle master!

apps.title: Bamboo Breeze Mahjong
apps.summary:
Bamboo Breeze Mahjong is a classic tile-matching puzzle game designed for relaxation and mental focus. Match identical pairs of traditional Mahjong tiles to clear the board and progress through levels at your own pace. Set against a serene bamboo forest backdrop, this game offers a calm, pressureless environment to unwind.

🀄 Classic Tile Matching Gameplay
Simply tap on open pairs of identical tiles to remove them from the board. The goal is to clear all tiles to complete the level. With no strict timers or high-pressure scoring systems, you can enjoy a steady, natural flow of play during short breaks or longer sessions.

🌿 Visually Soothing Bamboo Theme
Enjoy a clean and uncluttered visual experience inspired by nature, designed to make your puzzle-solving experience comfortable:
Peaceful Backgrounds: Play with soft green bamboo grove visuals that help reduce eye strain and digital fatigue.
Large Tiles: The game features large, clearly distinguished symbols and characters, making it easy to read and navigate.
Subtle Feedback: Experience gentle animations and authentic tile sounds with every successful match.

🧠 Gentle Brain Training
Keep your mind active and engaged through pattern recognition and spatial memory practice. The puzzles range from simple layouts to more structured arrangements, offering a gentle mental workout that fits seamlessly into your day.

⏰ Scheduled Relaxation Reminders
Build a consistent wellness routine with our integrated alarm feature. Easily schedule dedicated moments for your daily breaks directly within the application. When your selected time arrives, a friendly push notification will remind you to step away from your busy routine, unwind, and refresh your mind with a quick puzzle session.

apps.title: Ghost Sniper: War FPS Shooter
apps.summary:
Become the ultimate invisible predator in the most realistic sniper game!

Welcome to Ghost Sniper: War FPS Shooter, the premier military offline experience where precision is the only thing between victory and defeat. As an elite ghost sniper, you are deployed into high-stakes missions across the globe. Experience intense 3D gun shooter action that demands tactical mastery and a steady hand in the heat of a total war strike.

🌍 Global Battlefields & Tactical Missions
This is not just another shooting gallery. Our action war game takes you to the world’s deadliest conflict zones:
• The Middle East (Iraq & Afghanistan): Engage targets in dusty urban labyrinths and guard strategic outposts in vast desert landscapes.
• Eastern Europe: Navigate the chilling atmosphere of abandoned cities and desolate industrial ruins.
• Africa: Neutralize threats across wide-open savannas and volatile border crossings.
• South & Central American Jungles: Hunt down guerilla insurgents in dense tropical foliage where every shadow hides a secret.

🎯 Advanced Physics & Realistic 3D Graphics
Experience a true 3D sniper simulation powered by a cutting-edge physics engine:
• True Ballistics: Master the art of the long shot. Calculate for wind speed, bullet drop (gravity), and target movement.
• Realistic Combat: High-fidelity animations and destructible environments make every war strike feel impactful.
• AAA Visuals: Console-quality textures and dynamic lighting bring the battlefield to life on your mobile device.

🔫 Deadly Arsenal & Customization
Choose your weapon from a massive collection of military-grade gear:
• Legendary bolt-action rifles, semi-auto snipers, and suppressed firearms for stealth operations.
• Deep Customization: Upgrade your scopes, magazines, barrels, and stocks to build the perfect tool for military shooting.

🛠 Key Game Features:
• Offline Shooter: No internet? No problem. Enjoy the full campaign anytime, anywhere.
• FPS Action: Immersive first-person perspective designed for maximum combat flow.
• Tactical Ops: Plan your approach, utilize cover, and remain a ghost until the mission is complete.
• Modern Warfare: Face a variety of enemies, from elite units to hidden guerilla cells.
• Free to Play: Experience the complete war game experience for free.

Join the ranks of the world's most elite marksmen. Download Ghost Sniper: War FPS Shooter now and prove you are the best shot in the business.

One shot, one kill. Leave no trace.

apps.title: Zoo Prank: Crazy Animals
apps.summary:
Zoo Prank: Crazy Animals brings you a world of laughter and strategic mischief. Sneak behind bushes, use clever props, and find the perfect timing to trigger epic reactions from the wild animals. Wake up the sleeping elephant, or trick the monkeys into a banana frenzy! Every tool is a unique puzzle packed with humor and surprises.

GAME FEATURES:

- Hilarious Prank Puzzles: Figure out the best way to troll different animals. Use balloons, fake bugs, loud horns, and more!
- Meet the Crazy Animals: Watch the funny and unpredictable reactions of elephants, giraffes, monkeys, and dinosaurs as they get pranked!
- Stealth & Strategy: Sneak around carefully! Avoid the watchful eyes of the zoo security and angry zookeepers. One wrong move and you’re busted!

- Stunning 3D Graphics: Bright, colorful visuals and funny animations that bring the chaotic zoo to life.

Can you become the ultimate Prank Master and turn the quiet zoo into total madness? Download Zoo Prank: Crazy Animals now and start the funny chaos today!

apps.title: Rhythm Tiles: Pop Songs
apps.summary:
🚀 Step into the neon future of Rhythm Games and enjoy cyber music piano！
Are you ready to test your reflexes and become a true piano master? Welcome to Rhythm Tiles, the most immersive and visually stunning cyber music experience on mobile! If you are a fan of piano games, rhythm games, and high-octane music games, you’ve just found your next obsession.
This isn't just another casual piano game; it’s a high-speed journey through a digital universe where every tap creates a symphony. Whether you're a fan of Kpop games, EDM, or classic pop, Rhythm Tiles brings the beat to your fingertips in a way you've never felt before.

---
🕹️ How to Play: Tap, Slide, and Conquer the Beat!
Rhythm Tiles is designed to be intuitive for beginners but offers a legendary challenge for rhythm game pros.
1. Watch the Screen: As the rhythm tiles fall from the top in a sleek cyber interface, get your fingers ready!
2. Tap the Tiles: Tap the black or colored tiles exactly as they hit the rhythm line.
3. Hold & Slide: For long notes, press and hold to sustain the melody.
4. Precision is Key: Don't miss a tile! Missing even one will break your combo and end your run.
5. Boost Your Score: Collect glowing balls and golds on the track to trigger "Fever Mode" and double your points!

---
🔥 Why Rhythm Tiles is the Ultimate Music Game?
🎶 A Massive, Ever-Growing Song Library
From the latest chart-topping Kpop hits to pulse-pounding EDM and classic piano masterpieces, our song games library is updated weekly. No matter your taste, you’ll find the perfect beat to play along to.
🌌 Stunning Cyberpunk Visuals
Escape into a world of neon lights and futuristic aesthetics. Our cyber theme transforms every piano game session into a visual feast, with dynamic backgrounds that react to your performance.
📶 No Wifi? No Problem! (Offline Games)
Searching for no wifi games? We’ve got you covered. Enjoy the full rhythm game experience anywhere—on a plane, the subway, or in the middle of nowhere. Rhythm Tiles is one of the premier offline games for music lovers.
🏆 Compete and Unlock
Unlock unique skins for your tiles and even different "sound fonts." Want your piano to sound like a digital synth or a classic grand? The choice is yours. Collect balls of light to unlock secret "Hardcore" versions of your favorite tracks.

---
⭐ Key Features ⭐
Free Games Excellence: Download and play for free! Experience high-quality music games content without a price tag.
Piano Games Perfection: Smooth, responsive tap mechanics that make you feel like a real piano master.
Kpop Games Mode: Dedicated playlists featuring the hottest Kpop music and idols.
Rhythm & Beat Mastery: Test your hand-eye coordination with various difficulty levels, from "Chill" to "Cyber Legend."
Fun Games for Everyone: A fun game that’s easy to pick up for kids, yet deep enough for adults and pro gamers.
Small Footprint: Optimized to run smoothly on all devices while maintaining high-fidelity audio.
No Wifi Games: Fully functional offline games support for on-the-go entertainment.
Interactive Effects: Watch the balls and sparks fly with every perfect tap on the tiles.

---
👑 Become a Rhythm Legend
Stop just listening to music and start playing it! Rhythm Tiles combines the addictive nature of tile tapping with the soul of a professional piano game. Improve your timing, challenge your friends on the global leaderboards, and see if you have the speed to handle the fastest rhythm games on the market.
Ready to drop the beat?
👉 Download Rhythm Tiles for FREE today and let your cyber journey begin!
